flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Mech-Tech College rose 39% between 2017 and 2020 ($2.5k → $3.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mech-Tech College fell 16% between 2006 and 2009 (76.4% → 64.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mech-Tech College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.1k → $11.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mech-Tech College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.1k → $11.4k).
